overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), showing a character walking along a rocky riverbank and wading through a shallow stream surrounded by cliffs and pine forests. The clip features high-fidelity natural environments with dynamic water and vegetation.

events.description: camera moves through leafy bush briefly obscuring view
approaching the water's edge and beginning to descend toward the stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank toward the stream, navigating around vegetation

entered.detail: tall tan rock formation with sparse trees on top
dense evergreen trees lining the opposite bank
calm flowing water reflecting the sky
gravel and stone ground with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit river valley with a rocky cliff on the left and pine forest on the right. The camera moves forward along the gravel shore, passing through some bushes, approaching the stream ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with visible current

events.description: steps from dry rocky shore into the shallow stream
game UI prompt appears for picking and examining a plant

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river water, moving steadily toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: large boulders partially visible beneath the water surface
rippling surface showing gentle flow of the stream

segments.scene_description: The character enters the stream and wades through shallow water with visible current. Large rocks emerge from the water, and the right-side forest grows closer. A brief game interaction prompt appears for examining flora.

events.description: cloud cover increases slightly, creating softer lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing through the stream toward the tree-lined opposite bank, navigating around submerged rocks

entered.detail: white fluffy clouds gathering in the sky
dense evergreen forest approaching on the opposite shore

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the far bank through deeper water, with the left cliff receding and the right forest growing prominent. Clouds begin to gather overhead, softening the sunlight as the character nears the tree-lined shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sunlit river valley into the cool depths of a shallow stream. It begins along a gravel shore between a rocky cliff and a pine forest, pushing through low bushes toward the water's edge. As the camera enters the stream, the perspective shifts to wading through a visible current around emerging boulders while the forest on the right draws closer. The scene then progresses through deeper water toward the far bank, with the left cliff receding into the distance. Finally, the sunlight softens as clouds gather overhead, guiding the camera toward the dense, tree-lined shore.
